subcodes.first_line: O Moon! Thy letter hath appeared before the Most Great Scene, and whatsoever was mentioned therein hath been witnessed. Praise be unto God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قمر کتابت در منظر اکبر حاضر و آنچه در او مذکور مشاهده شد لله الحمد که
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort
